title: Join the new AI Agents Vibe Coding Course from Google and Kaggle
description: <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/Vibe_Coding_Course_herosocial.max-600x600.format-webp.webp">Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.
